title: Why RE Went Up Yesterday
summary: RE was one of the strongest crypto movers yesterday, gaining 22.3% over 24 hours while attracting active market participation.
reasons: The token ranked among the strongest 24-hour gainers with a 22.3% move.
Roughly $448M in 24-hour trading volume suggests active short-term participation.
The move may reflect renewed momentum interest as traders rotated into recent outperformers.
